title: A CFSG-free explicit Jordan's theorem over arbitrary fields
summary: We prove a version of Jordan's classification theorem for finite subgroups of $\mathrm{GL}_{n}(K)$ that is at the same time quantitatively explicit, CFSG-free, and valid for arbitrary $K$. This is the first proof to satisfy all three properties at once. Our overall strategy follows Larsen and Pink [24], with explicit computations based on techniques developed by the authors and Helfgott [2, 3], particularly in relation to dimensional estimates.
